parameters.query:
SELECT e.id as event_id, e.tenant_id, e.event_type, e.payload, e.created_at
FROM events e
WHERE e.tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
  AND e.event_type = 'approval.approved'
  AND e.processed = false
  AND e.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
ORDER BY e.created_at ASC
LIMIT 10;

UPDATE approvals SET execution_status = 'running', execution_attempts = execution_attempts + 1
WHERE id = '$(approval_id)'
  AND execution_status IN ('not_started', 'failed')
  AND tenant_id = '$(tenant_id)';

UPDATE approvals
SET execution_status = CASE WHEN execution_attempts >= 3 THEN 'failed' ELSE 'not_started' END,
    execution_error = '$(error)'
WHERE id = '$(approval_id)';
UPDATE events SET processed = true WHERE id = '$(event_id)';

meta.description: Polls events table every 2 min for approval.approved events. Executes action, updates approval execution_status, marks event processed. Idempotent.
